final:
// // This module synchronously captures an 8-bit wide input (d) on the falling edge of a clock signal (clk) and outputs this value as an 8-bit wide output (q).
module top_module(
	input clk,
	input [7:0] d,
	output reg [7:0] q);always @(posedge clk)
		q <= d;
	
endmodule
